validationReport.title: Structural Consistency Validation - Lotomania Genesis Lottery System
validationReport.objective: Validate data quality, metric integrity, backtest capability, and recentResults flow

task_1_draws_history.name: Validate lotomania_draws Historical Data
evidence: All 10 draws retrieved successfully from lotomania_draws table
Each draw contains exactly 20 unique numbers in [0-99] range

task_2_territory_entropy_nan_risk.name: Analyze territoryEntropy NaN Risk

safeguards.purpose: Prevent NaN when territory is empty
Skip zero entries in Shannon entropy calculation

mathematicalSafety.risk: ZERO - constant never undefined or zero

logSafety.input: p where p = u/total, p in (0,1)

task_2_territory_entropy_nan_risk.conclusion: No NaN risk detected - entropy() is mathematically safe
task_2_territory_entropy_nan_risk.impact: territoryEntropy metric in GenerationResult will always be valid finite number

task_3_backtest_consistency.name: Validate Backtest Capability and Consistency

with_10_draws.note: Uses all available draws for backtest windows

with_maximum_draws.note: Backtest will use 10 for all windows

task_3_backtest_consistency.conclusion: Backtest with 10 draws is executable, though statistically limited

task_4_recent_results_flow.name: Validate recentResults Pipeline Flow

step_2_fetch.query: SELECT ... FROM generations ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10

step_3_ui_integration.errorHandling: try/catch with fallback to empty array

generation_2.inGenerator: Used for context and ecosystem flow

dataFlow.pattern: Circular: each generation can inform next via recentResults

task_4_recent_results_flow.conclusion: recentResults flow is complete and functional

criterion_1_data_quality.name: Data Quality OK
criterion_1_data_quality.evidence: All 10 draws have exactly 20 valid numbers

criterion_2_metrics_nan_free.name: Metrics NaN Free
criterion_2_metrics_nan_free.evidence: Code analysis shows complete protection against NaN

criterion_3_backtest_capable.name: Backtest Capable
criterion_3_backtest_capable.requirement: Can run backtest with available draws
criterion_3_backtest_capable.evidence: 10 draws > minimum requirement for basic backtest

criterion_4_recent_results_flow.name: recentResults Flow
criterion_4_recent_results_flow.requirement: Generations properly fetched and passed to generator

objective_assessment.summary: The Lotomania system is structurally consistent and data-metric stable. All critical validations passed.

strengths: Entropy calculations are mathematically safe (no NaN risk)
Backtest capability confirmed with available data
Error handling present for edge cases
limitations: Limited historical data (only 10 draws) - statistical significance reduced
Backtest window analysis constrained by small dataset
Evolutionary retrospective limited to 4 generations max (needs 8 draws minimum)
Recommendation: Collect more draws over time for robust analysis

recommendations.action: Verify hit rates empirically against actual Lotomania results
recommendations.reason: Validate generator correctness in real world
Current 10 draws is minimal - target 50+ for statistical robustness
Without Lotomania historical average, hard to assess performance

recommendations.action: Consider time-series analysis of territoryEntropy trends
recommendations.reason: Monitor ecosystem saturation over successive generations

approvalStatus.overallRating: PASS - Ready for use with noted limitations
